HrisSync.title: HRIS sync
HrisSync.description: Two-way sync with your HRIS (Personio or BambooHR).

connect.heading: Connect an HRIS
connect.description: Connect Personio or BambooHR to sync employee registry fields. Financial and compliance data is never overwritten.

empty.heading: No HRIS connected
empty.description: Connect a provider above to start syncing employees.

mapping.heading: Field mapping
mapping.description: Map each registry field to the matching HRIS attribute name.

error.heading: Couldn't load HRIS status
error.description: Something went wrong loading the connection.

disclaimer.acknowledgement: I understand this is decision-support, not a legal determination, and I'll confirm any classification with a qualified advisor before I rely on it.

ab5.tooltip: California AB5 watchlist: this engagement performs work in California, where the stricter ABC test applies. Review with your advisor — this is a flag, not a determination.

section530.label: §530 relief
section530.tooltip: May be eligible for §530 safe-harbor relief. Confirm reporting consistency, substantive consistency, and a reasonable basis with your advisor.

citations.federal: IRS common-law test (Rev. Rul. 87-41): behavioral control, financial control, and the relationship of the parties.
citations.section530: §530 of the Revenue Act of 1978 — safe-harbor relief where reporting consistency, substantive consistency, and a reasonable basis are met.

UsClassification.adviserVerify: Figures, forms, and classifications shown here need verification by a jurisdiction-specific legal or tax advisor before you rely on them.

PayrollExport.pageDescription: Export employee master data to your payroll system for each market.
PayrollExport.empty: No payroll targets are available yet.

employeeIds.label: Employees to export
employeeIds.hint: Enter one worker ID per line, or separate them with spaces or commas.

targets.heading: Export targets
targets.notEnabled: Not enabled for your organization yet.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
